question: 核查D902部门年度预算执行，识别首次导致预算超限且没有专项审批的报销记录；专项审批记录不得误报。

policy_questions.question: 部门年度预算执行的合规要求是什么？
key_clauses: 08_budget_management.md 第二条：各部门应在年度预算额度内发生费用
08_budget_management.md 第三条：部门费用累计使用达到年度预算额度的1.0倍后,原则上不得继续报销
08_budget_management.md 第四条：因监管要求、客户服务或经营连续性确需超预算支出的,应履行专项审批
01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md 第十三条：部门年度预算不足时不得继续报销。预算使用达到预算额度的1.0倍后,确需发生的费用应履行专项审批

data_questions.question: D902部门年度预算额度和累计已批准报销金额是多少？
D902部门所有已批准报销记录按时间排序后，哪一笔首次使累计金额超过预算5万元？
data_questions.needs: list_expenses for D902 with status=approved, sort by expense_date

data_questions.question: 首次超限记录是否具有专项审批？
data_questions.needs: check special_approval field; if true, continue to next record

evidence_requirements: All D902 approved expense records sorted by date
Special approval status of the first overrun record
Policy clauses on budget overrun and special approval

execution_steps.action: Main agent: run policy-version-check for budget policy applicability
Data analyst: get all D902 records, compute cumulative, identify first overrun
Run batch-expense-analysis if needed for approval verification

subagent_plan.task: Retrieve all D902 approved expense records, sort by expense_date, compute cumulative spending, identify the first record where cumulative exceeds 50000, check special_approval status, and return detailed findings.

stopping_conditions: All D902 approved records retrieved and analyzed
Special approval status verified for first overrun record
